Career
in soft natured lines.
SATURN+JUPITER+
VENUS Manager in finanical institution.
SATURN+JUP+
D.HEAD Gangman, head in Municipalities (a
leader or Head of menial job
workers). Career in Rail ways.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 61
SATURN+JUP+
D.TAIL .. Occultist-knowledge in Vedas,
Puranas-(e nj oys poorva Karma
yoga)-inclination towards Deeds
connected with liberation (career
connected with such aspects)-
Lawyer.
NOTE: There are Millions of career lines existing, millions more
emerge in future (in peculiar ways). Therefore It would be
necessary to study the effects of planertary combination on
career, keeping in view the nature, character and effect of each
planet in the combination, accordingly.
For ex: l SATURN+MERCURY+DRAGON HEAD
0 2
I
II
10 MER 3
9 4
I
DH 5
8 7 6
If this combination is aspected by the moon from the 7th or
5th or 9th, indicates that the native can exerdise his intellectual
abilities for fraud.

62 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
